# SSC: Semantic Scan Context for Large-Scale Place Recognition

- **Work ID:** `LPR-070`
- **Reviewed version:** `arxiv:2107.00382`
- **Year / venue / type:** 2021 / IROS / `arxiv_preprint`
- **Curation tier:** `evidence_reviewed`

- **Representative tier:** `ordinary`

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI Odometry 00, 02, 05, 06, 07 and 08, SemanticKITTI labels, RangeNet++ predicted labels — `source_fact`; manual, p. 5–6, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-III
- **input_unit:** pair of single semantically labeled LiDAR point clouds, one descriptor is generated per aligned scan — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–5, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-III
- **invariances:** none, relative yaw and planar translation are explicitly estimated and compensated — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 3–5, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-III
- **representation:** semantic segmentation, representative-object filtering, 1-D semantic radial vectors for yaw estimation, fast semantic ICP for x-y translation, point-cloud alignment, polar Semantic Scan Context label-priority matrix, semantic-label equality score — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–5, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-III
- **uses_learning:** no, the core method is handcrafted and may consume labels from an external learned segmenter — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–7, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-III
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–7, § Abstract;III. Method;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-III
